hf.d:
n a grey tetravalent metallic element that resembles zirconium chemically and is found in zirconium minerals; used in filaments for its ready emission of electrons
n 3 to 30 megahertz

hfa.t: abbr. hard factory automation 工厂自动化

hfc.d: n a fluorocarbon emitted as a by-product of industrial manufacturing

hfcs.d: n a fluorocarbon emitted as a by-product of industrial manufacturing

hff.t: abbr. horizontal falling film 水平降落液膜

hfff.t: abbr. hazard of failure 失败风险; Hungarian Freedom Fighters Federation 匈牙利自由战士协会

hfmd.t: abbr. hand-foot-and-mouth disease 手口蹄疫

hfo.t: abbr. heavy fuel oil 重（燃）油; high-frequency oscillator 高频振荡器

hfp.t: abbr. hostile fire pay 火线执勤津贴

hfs.d:
n a grey tetravalent metallic element that resembles zirconium chemically and is found in zirconium minerals; used in filaments for its ready emission of electrons
n 3 to 30 megahertz

hfx.t: abbr. High Frequency Transceiver 高频收发报机
